unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Neuschwanstein Castle, Germany
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：城堡（castle）里有一头牛（cattle）。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. & vt. 申请；请求 vt. 应用；涂（油漆、乳剂）
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: apply for a visa
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字根记忆：ap（去）+ ply（折叠）→ 弯腰递交申请。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: apply for a visa
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 日常搭配：apply for 后面常跟具体要申请的目标（如签证、工作）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: apply for a visa
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：“维萨”，有了签证才能去维也纳看萨克斯表演。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. 租用；出租 vi. 租用；租金为 n. 租金
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: rent a car
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：在租来的（rent）草地上搭帐篷（tent）。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. & vt. 收收拾（行李） vt. 包装 n. （商品的）纸包；纸袋；大包
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: pack some clothes
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：把行李打包（pack）放进大麻袋（sack）里。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 令人惊奇的；令人惊喜的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Jiuzhaigou, China Why famous: amazing waterfalls, colourful lakes, beautiful mountains
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：迷宫（maze）大得令人惊奇（amazing）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: After reaching your destination, you will have a day to explore and be amazed by this ancient city.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词尾记忆：-ed 结尾修饰人，表示“感到惊奇的”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Actually, I've just finished the travel arrangements!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：arrange（安排）+ -ment（名词后缀）→ 安排，筹备。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Jiuzhaigou is an extremely beautiful place.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：extreme（极端的）+ -ly（副词后缀）→ 极其。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What other sources of information can you find about Peru?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：来源（source）是资源（resource）的基石。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 狭窄的 vi. & vt. （使）变窄
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: PERU is a country on the Pacific coast of South America with three main areas: narrow, dry, flat land running along the coast...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：狭窄的（narrow）街道上掉落了一支箭（arrow）。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 平坦的；扁平的 n. 公寓；单元房
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: PERU is a country on the Pacific coast of South America with three main areas: narrow, dry, flat land running along the coast...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：平坦的（flat）木板在水上漂浮（float）。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 强有力的；有权势的；有影响力的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the 1400s and 1500s, Peru was the centre of the powerful ancient Inca Empire.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：power（力量）+ -ful（充满...的）→ 强有力的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the 1400s and 1500s, Peru was the centre of the powerful ancient Inca Empire.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：“音牌儿”，这个帝国用特制的音乐牌来传递命令。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The Inca emperor lived in the now-famous site Machu Picchu.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：管理帝国（empire）的人是皇帝（emperor）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The Inca emperor lived in the now-famous site Machu Picchu.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形近字：在这个位置（site）看风景（sight）。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: take control of vs lose control of
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Spain took control of Peru in the 16th century and ruled until 1821.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词组拆解：take（拿走）+ control（控制）→ 牢牢掌握主动权。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 官方的；正式的；公务的 n. 官员；要员
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It is for this reason that Spanish is the main official language of Peru.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：办公室（office）里坐的是官方人员（official）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Recognise text type
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：rec（反复）+ ogn（知道）+ ise → 反复核对终于认出来了。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 类型；种类 vi. & vt. 打字
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Recognise text type
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 一词多义：不同类型（type）的电脑，键盘打字（type）的感觉也不同。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 空中航行；航班；航程
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A short flight from Cusco takes you from the Andes into the Amazon rainforest.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：坐航班（flight）去参加格斗（fight）比赛。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: From there, you'll spend one day travelling by boat to your accommodation in the middle of the forest.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 趣味记忆：ac+com（共同）+mo+da（大）+tion → 大家都住在一个大大的住所里。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 唯一的；独特的；特有的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You can then spend three days exploring the rainforest with a local guide and enjoying the plants and animals unique to the rainforest.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：uni（单一）→ 独一无二的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: This four-day walking tour will take you on amazing paths through the Andes Mountains on the way to the city of Machu Picchu.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：走过这条林间小路（path）去洗个热水澡（bath）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: After reaching your destination, you will have a day to explore...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字根记忆：destin（命运注定）+ ation（名词后缀）→ 命中注定要抵达的终点。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Inca builders cut stones to exact sizes so that nothing was needed to hold walls together other than the perfect fit of the stones.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 固定搭配：表示“除了...之外”，等同于 except。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There are two especially interesting things to admire about the Inca civilisation.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：“额的妈呀”，太让人钦佩了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Second, the Incas built wonderful cities full of amazing architecture— but there were no markets in these cities.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：architect（建筑师）的成果就是architecture（建筑设计）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: but some people have said that it was done on purpose by the architect!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 后缀记忆：-ect 结尾常指某一职业的专家。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: For more brochures about other package tours around Peru, contact us at tourinfo@travelperu.org.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：Bro（兄弟）给你一本宣传手册（brochure）看一看。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 包裹；包装盒 vt. 将……包装好
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: For more brochures about other package tours around Peru, contact us at tourinfo@travelperu.org.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：pack（打包）+ age（名词后缀）→ 打包好的东西即包裹。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: For more brochures about other package tours around Peru, contact us at tourinfo@travelperu.org.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 直译记忆：全部服务打包（package）在一起的旅行（tour）。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. 联络；联系 n. 联系；接触
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: For more brochures about other package tours around Peru, contact us at tourinfo@travelperu.org.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 前缀记忆：con-（共同）+ tact（触碰）→ 保持互相联系。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There are two especially interesting things to admire about the Inca civilisation.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：civil（公民的、文明的）+ isation（名词后缀）→ 文明。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: These Inca roads were made up of two north-south highways...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解：把各部分拼凑制作（make）起来（up）→ 构成。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The roads were for Inca soldiers and their...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：士兵（soldier）的肩膀（shoulder）上扛着枪。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 交通运输系统 vt. 运输；运送
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Transport [Table Header]
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字根记忆：trans（转移）+ port（港口、运送）→ 跨港口运送。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. 徒步旅行 vt. 去……远足 n. 远足；徒步旅行
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: boating, hiking, exploring nature
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：骑自行车（bike）太累了，改成徒步（hike）吧。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Would you like to travel business class or economy?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：“依靠农民”，国家的经济主要还是依靠农民伯伯。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 经济（上）的；经济学的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Extracted from Appendix Vocabulary List
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词尾记忆：economy（经济）+ -ic（形容词后缀）→ 经济的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 借款；信用；称赞；学分
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: By credit card.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字根记忆：cred（相信）→ 让人相信你，所以可以先借款、给信用。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: By credit card.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：代表信用（credit）的卡片（card）。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 细节；详情；细微之处
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Details: travel date(s)...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：把尾巴（tail）底下的（de）每个跳蚤看得一清二楚 → 注意细节。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: check in / check out
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 方向记忆：核对完（check）信息走进（in）宾馆。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: check in / check out
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 方向记忆：核对完（check）账单走出（out）宾馆。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. （正式或礼貌的）要求；请求 vt. （正式或礼貌地）要求；请求
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Special requests
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 前缀记忆：re-（反复）+ quest（寻求、提问）→ 反复请求。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: a view
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：网络上的各种点击量（view）代表了大众的景色与看法。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I've heard that it is an amazing sight, and I can't wait to go.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字母组合：-ight 结尾，通常与视觉、看、光线相关。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's amazing that there are more than 8,000 statues...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字根记忆：stat（站立）+ ue → 站立在那里的艺术品就是雕像。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: more than 8,000 statues were made in the third century BCE...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 常识记忆：Before Common Era（通用纪元前）的缩写。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: to guard the tomb of the Chinese Emperor Qinshihuang!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 特殊发音：最后的小尾巴 b 是不发音的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: which still has not been completely unearthed.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 前缀记忆：un-（除去、移出）+ earth（土地）→ 从土里挪出来即挖掘。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 议论；评论 vi. & vt. 发表意见；评论
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Revise your draft according to your partner's comments.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 网络常用：在网络上发表“评论”常用 comment 这个词。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 旅行指南；导游手册
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: buy a guidebook
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 【教材补充词汇】组合词：guide（向导）+ book（书）→ 导游书、指南。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: amazing waterfalls, colourful lakes, beautiful mountains
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 【教材补充词汇】组合词：water（水）+ fall（落下）→ 水落下来就是瀑布。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: connecting Cusco to Lake Titicaca.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 【教材补充词汇】组合词：high（高的、高级的）+ way（路）→ 高速公路、主干道。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: will start sightseeing right away
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 【教材补充词汇】组合词：sight（风景）+ see（看）+ ing → 去看风景。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: get a passport
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 【教材补充词汇】组合词：pass（通过）+ port（港口、关卡）→ 允许过关的证件。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adv. & adj. 整夜（的）；一夜之间（的）
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Extracted from Workbook Review Page 76
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 【教材补充词汇】组合词：over（越过）+ night（夜晚）→ 跨越一整夜。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: the Amazon rainforest
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 【教材补充词汇】组合词：rain（雨）+ forest（森林）→ 经常下雨的森林。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 火急火燎；迫不及待想做某事
unit_vocabulary.comparison: can't wait to vs look forward to
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I've heard that it is an amazing sight, and I can't wait to go.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 【教材补充词汇】直译记忆：不能（can't）继续等待（wait）去做某事了。
